description_long: This is a large suspension bridge spanning a body of water, anchored at both ends by steep, rocky embankments. The bridge features two prominent towers supporting a series of dark cables that arc gracefully above the deck, characteristic of classic suspension design. The deck itself is supported by a series of white arches beneath, adding both structural integrity and visual interest. The surface of the bridge is broad and flat, suitable for vehicular or pedestrian traffic, and is bordered by dark railings for safety. The landscape around the bridge includes grassy patches and rocky outcrops, enhancing the naturalistic setting. The overall color palette is dominated by earthy browns, greens, and blues, with contrasting white structural elements.
description: A large suspension bridge with arched supports, dark cables, and white deck arches, spanning between rocky embankments over water.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the bridge, highlighting the vertical towers and cables.
description_view_1: Angled view displaying the full span, suspension cables, and the white arches beneath the deck.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the length of the bridge and the alignment of the towers and cables.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the bridge's arches, cables, and the rocky embankments at both ends.
attribute_railing_design: dark metal bars with vertical balusters
